text:
The coverage gap is technically referred to as the initial coverage limit 
(ICL) for the Part D benefit. Plans that use a co-payment amount rather than a coinsurance percentage 
will not have a value in this field; see instead the corresponding co-payment variable called 
(GAP_MONPP_COPAY_1M). 

Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. The MOPP are currently 
referred to as standard mail order pharmacies within split networks. There is no change in the 
meaning of the
